info.title: Paymenter
info.description:
API documentation for Paymenter
Requires Paymenter v1.2.0 or higher.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available sorts are `id`, `code`, `visitors`, `reward`, `discount`, `created_at`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-id`.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Available includes are `user`, `userCount`, `userExists`, `orders`, `ordersCount`, `ordersExists`. You can include multiple options by separating them with a comma.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: How many items to show per page.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to show.

200.description:
Return the affiliates as a JSON response
